title: Improve
steps: Add the reagents(on ice) for synthesis of amilCP into 15 wells of the 384-well plate. Pipette well before adding reagents into the wells. banana amilCP %s %s banana trigger + banana amilCP %s %s T7 Strong Promoter + amilCP %s %s Do triple repeat
Seal the plate with microseal (on ice)
Temperature: Setpoint 37°C Shake: Orbital for 1:00 (1 min) Start Kinetic [ Run 6:00:00 (6 hour), Internal 0:05:00 (5 min)] Read: (A) 588 nm End Kinetic
Put the plate into plate reader. Incubate the mixture and measure the fluorescence in plate reader follow Setup 1 for 06:00:00
Measure the fluorescence excitation and emission intensity of the parts.
creator: Iris Chen
